def negative_iterator_materialized_to_list_before_single_pass_loop():
    rule_id = "iterator_materialized_to_list_before_single_pass_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag iterators converted to lists in hot paths when only one pass is needed."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
